article_meta.title: Facebook X Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy and CNN’s Clarissa Ward on the state of the war | The Conversation 02

reasoning: The model repeatedly flagged quoted/anonymously sourced statements as author bias and missed multiple clear instances of biased author prose. Only one flagged item (“scandal-ridden MAGA darling”) is a valid author-level bias with an appropriate label.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: 3 of 4 flagged items are direct quotes or attributed statements (anonymized bundler quote, ‘white whale’ metaphor in quotes, NRSC attack line), violating the attribution rule.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Most flagged items are not author prose; they are quotes the model misattributed as author bias. Only one item is a defensible author-level bias.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed multiple clear instances in author prose: ‘didn’t take long … to dim,’ ‘poured cold water … staggering price tag,’ ‘reality … massive injection of cash,’ ‘appeared laughable,’ and ‘easily dispatched.’
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: For the single correctly identified author phrase (‘scandal-ridden MAGA darling’), the label ‘Subjective Qualifying Adjectives’ is appropriate.
